content.description: Auth volume burn-down: ADFS declining, Okta growing. Identifies remaining ADFS-dependent apps and migration progress over time.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>ADFS → Okta: Migration Tracker</label>
    <description>Auth volume burn-down: ADFS declining, Okta growing. Identifies remaining ADFS-dependent apps and migration progress over time.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[{
  "title": "ADFS \u2192 Okta: Migration Tracker",
  "description": "Auth volume burn-down: ADFS declining, Okta growing. Identifies remaining ADFS-dependent apps and migration progress over time.",
  "inputs": {
    "input_global_trp": {
      "options": {
        "defaultValue": "-30d@d,now",
        "token": "global_time"
      },
      "title": "Time Range",
      "type": "input.timerange"
    }
  },
  "defaults": {
    "dataSources": {
      "ds.search": {
        "options": {
          "queryParameters": {
            "earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
            "latest": "$global_time.latest$"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "visualizations": {
    "viz_adfs_count": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_adfs_count"
      },
      "options": {
        "sparklineDisplay": "off",
        "trendDisplay": "off",
        "majorColor": "#c12f28"
      },
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "ADFS Sessions",
      "type": "splunk.singlevalue",
      "description": "How many times users logged in through ADFS"
    },
    "viz_okta_count": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_okta_count"
      },
      "options": {
        "sparklineDisplay": "off",
        "trendDisplay": "off",
        "majorColor": "#3fa21f"
      },
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "Okta Authentications",
      "type": "splunk.singlevalue",
      "description": "How many times users logged in through Okta"
    },
    "viz_migration_pct": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_migration_pct"
      },
      "options": {
        "sparklineDisplay": "off",
        "trendDisplay": "off",
        "unit": "%",
        "unitPosition": "after",
        "majorColor": "#3fa21f"
      },
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "Migration Progress (Okta %)",
      "type": "splunk.singlevalue",
      "description": "Okta logins as a share of all logins across both platforms"
    },
    "viz_burndown": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_burndown"
      },
      "options": {},
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "Auth Volume Over Time: ADFS vs Okta",
      "type": "splunk.line",
      "description": "Daily login volume \u2014 watch ADFS go down and Okta go up as apps migrate"
    },
    "viz_adfs_rps": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_adfs_rps"
      },
      "options": {},
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "Top ADFS Relying Parties (Migration Targets)",
      "type": "splunk.table",
      "description": "Apps still running through ADFS, busiest first \u2014 these are the next migration targets"
    },
    "viz_adfs_protocol": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_adfs_protocol"
      },
      "options": {},
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "Auth Protocol & IDP Breakdown",
      "type": "splunk.pie",
      "description": "How logins are being made across both platforms"
    },
    "viz_okta_apps": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_okta_apps"
      },
      "options": {},
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "Top Okta Apps",
      "type": "splunk.table",
      "description": "Apps getting the most use through Okta"
    },
    "viz_recent_adfs": {
      "containerOptions": {},
      "dataSources": {
        "primary": "ds_recent_adfs"
      },
      "options": {},
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false,
      "title": "Recent Authentications",
      "type": "splunk.table",
      "description": "50 most recent auths across both platforms. ADFS will dominate while migration is early \u2014 Okta rows appear as apps cut over and volume shifts."
    },
    "viz_header": {
      "type": "splunk.markdown",
      "options": {
        "markdown": "Tracks authentication traffic shifting from ADFS to Okta. All numbers reflect the selected time range."
      },
      "containerOptions": {},
      "showLastUpdated": false,
      "showProgressBar": false
    }
  },
  "dataSources": {
    "ds_adfs_count": {
      "name": "ADFS auth count",
      "options": {
        "query": "index=windows_events EventCode=1200 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | dedup activity_id | stats count AS total",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
          "latest": "$global_time.latest$"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_okta_count": {
      "name": "Okta auth count",
      "options": {
        "query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=app.oauth2.authorize.code) | spath output=tgt_app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=redirect_uri path=\"debugContext.debugData.redirectUri\" | spath output=client_id path=\"actor.id\" | spath output=actor_display path=\"actor.displayName\" | eval app_unit=case(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", redirect_uri, 1==1, tgt_app) | lookup okta_oidc_internal_clients.csv client_id OUTPUT internal AS oidc_internal | where isnull(oidc_internal) | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv uri AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_oidc | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv application AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_saml | eval actor_display_for_oidc=if(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", actor_display, null()) | eval app=coalesce(friendly_oidc, friendly_saml, actor_display_for_oidc, app_unit) | lookup okta_app_aliases.csv unit AS app OUTPUT canonical AS aliased | eval app=coalesce(aliased, app) | lookup okta_internal_apps.csv app OUTPUT internal | where isnull(internal) AND isnotnull(app) AND app!=\"\" AND app!=\"OpenID Connect Client\" AND app!=\"unknown\" | stats count AS total",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
          "latest": "$global_time.latest$"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_migration_pct": {
      "name": "Migration percentage",
      "options": {
        "query": "index=windows_events EventCode=1200 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | dedup activity_id | eval platform=\"adfs\" | append [search index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=app.oauth2.authorize.code) | spath output=tgt_app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=redirect_uri path=\"debugContext.debugData.redirectUri\" | spath output=client_id path=\"actor.id\" | spath output=actor_display path=\"actor.displayName\" | eval app_unit=case(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", redirect_uri, 1==1, tgt_app) | lookup okta_oidc_internal_clients.csv client_id OUTPUT internal AS oidc_internal | where isnull(oidc_internal) | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv uri AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_oidc | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv application AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_saml | eval actor_display_for_oidc=if(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", actor_display, null()) | eval app=coalesce(friendly_oidc, friendly_saml, actor_display_for_oidc, app_unit) | lookup okta_app_aliases.csv unit AS app OUTPUT canonical AS aliased | eval app=coalesce(aliased, app) | lookup okta_internal_apps.csv app OUTPUT internal | where isnull(internal) AND isnotnull(app) AND app!=\"\" AND app!=\"OpenID Connect Client\" AND app!=\"unknown\" | eval platform=\"okta\"] | stats count by platform | eventstats sum(count) as grand_total | where platform=\"okta\" | eval pct_raw=count/grand_total*100 | eval migration_pct=if(pct_raw>0 AND pct_raw<1,\"<1\",tostring(round(pct_raw,1))) | table migration_pct",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
          "latest": "$global_time.latest$"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_burndown": {
      "name": "Auth burn-down timechart",
      "options": {
        "query": "index=windows_events EventCode=1200 (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | dedup activity_id | eval platform=\"ADFS\" | append [search index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=app.oauth2.authorize.code) | spath output=tgt_app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=redirect_uri path=\"debugContext.debugData.redirectUri\" | spath output=client_id path=\"actor.id\" | spath output=actor_display path=\"actor.displayName\" | eval app_unit=case(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", redirect_uri, 1==1, tgt_app) | lookup okta_oidc_internal_clients.csv client_id OUTPUT internal AS oidc_internal | where isnull(oidc_internal) | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv uri AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_oidc | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv application AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_saml | eval actor_display_for_oidc=if(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", actor_display, null()) | eval app=coalesce(friendly_oidc, friendly_saml, actor_display_for_oidc, app_unit) | lookup okta_app_aliases.csv unit AS app OUTPUT canonical AS aliased | eval app=coalesce(aliased, app) | lookup okta_internal_apps.csv app OUTPUT internal | where isnull(internal) AND isnotnull(app) AND app!=\"\" AND app!=\"OpenID Connect Client\" AND app!=\"unknown\" | eval platform=\"Okta\"] | timechart span=1d count by platform",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
          "latest": "$global_time.latest$"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_adfs_rps": {
      "name": "Top ADFS relying parties",
      "options": {
        "query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex field=_raw \"<RelyingParty>(?<relying_party_raw>[^<]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"<AuthProtocol>(?<auth_protocol>[^<]+)\" | stats values(EventCode) as stages values(relying_party_raw) as rps_raw by activity_id | eval token_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0) | eval cred_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0) | eval token_fail=if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0) | eval cred_fail=if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0) | eval outcome=case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1,\"Success\",token_fail==1,\"Token Failure\",cred_fail==1,\"Credential Failure\",1=1,\"Other\") | where outcome=\"Success\" | eval rps_raw=mvdedup(rps_raw) | eval rp_clean=mvfilter(rps_raw!=\"WS-Trust endpoint (legacy clients)\" AND rps_raw!=\"https://host.example.gov/[redacted-path] AND rps_raw!=\"urn:microsoft:userinfo\") | eval relying_party=coalesce(mvindex(rp_clean,0),mvindex(rps_raw,0)) | where relying_party!=\"urn:microsoft:userinfo\" | lookup ADFS_friendly_names.csv url as relying_party output friendlyName as rp_friendly | eval relying_party=coalesce(rp_friendly,relying_party) | search relying_party=* | stats count AS Sessions by relying_party | sort -Sessions | head 20 | rename relying_party AS \"Relying Party\"",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
          "latest": "$global_time.latest$"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_adfs_protocol": {
      "name": "ADFS auth protocol breakdown",
      "options": {
        "query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex field=_raw \"<AuthProtocol>(?<auth_protocol>[^<]+)\" | stats values(EventCode) as stages values(auth_protocol) as protos by activity_id | eval token_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0) | eval cred_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0) | eval token_fail=if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0) | eval cred_fail=if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0) | eval outcome=case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1,\"Success\",token_fail==1,\"Token Failure\",cred_fail==1,\"Credential Failure\",1=1,\"Other\") | where outcome!=\"Other\" | eval proto_raw=lower(mvindex(mvfilter(len(protos)>0),0)) | eval protocol=case(match(proto_raw,\"oauth\"),\"ADFS / OIDC\",match(proto_raw,\"saml\"),\"ADFS / SAML\",match(proto_raw,\"wsfed\"),\"ADFS / WS-Fed\",1=1,\"ADFS / Other\") | stats count by protocol | append [search index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.sso | spath output=sign_on_mode path=\"debugContext.debugData.signOnMode\" | eval protocol=case(sign_on_mode=\"SAML 2.0\",\"Okta / SAML\",sign_on_mode=\"OpenID Connect\",\"Okta / OIDC\",isnotnull(sign_on_mode),\"Okta / \"+sign_on_mode,1=1,\"Okta / Other\") | stats count by protocol] | sort -count",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
          "latest": "$global_time.latest$"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_okta_apps": {
      "name": "Top Okta apps",
      "options": {
        "query": "index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log (eventType=user.authentication.sso OR eventType=user.authentication.auth_via_IDP OR eventType=app.oauth2.authorize.code) | spath output=tgt_app path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=redirect_uri path=\"debugContext.debugData.redirectUri\" | spath output=client_id path=\"actor.id\" | spath output=actor_display path=\"actor.displayName\" | eval app_unit=case(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", redirect_uri, 1==1, tgt_app) | lookup okta_oidc_internal_clients.csv client_id OUTPUT internal AS oidc_internal | where isnull(oidc_internal) | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv uri AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_oidc | lookup okta_apps_inventory.csv application AS app_unit OUTPUT friendly_name AS friendly_saml | eval actor_display_for_oidc=if(eventType=\"app.oauth2.authorize.code\", actor_display, null()) | eval app=coalesce(friendly_oidc, friendly_saml, actor_display_for_oidc, app_unit) | lookup okta_app_aliases.csv unit AS app OUTPUT canonical AS aliased | eval app=coalesce(aliased, app) | lookup okta_internal_apps.csv app OUTPUT internal | where isnull(internal) AND isnotnull(app) AND app!=\"\" AND app!=\"OpenID Connect Client\" AND app!=\"unknown\" | stats count AS authentications by app | eval app=if(app=\"unknown\",\"Okta \u2192 ADFS Federation Probe\",app) | sort -authentications | head 20 | rename app AS \"Application\", authentications AS \"Authentications\"",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
          "latest": "$global_time.latest$"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    },
    "ds_recent_adfs": {
      "name": "Recent ADFS auths",
      "options": {
        "query": "index=windows_events (EventCode=403 OR EventCode IN (1200,1201,1202,1203)) (host=*-ess-sen-adf5* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso1* OR host=s-ess-sen-sso2*) | rex \"Activity ID:\\s*(?<activity_id>[0-9A-Fa-f-]{36})\" | rex field=_raw \"<UserId>(?<xml_user>[^<]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"<RelyingParty>(?<relying_party_raw>[^<]+)\" | rex field=_raw \"<AuthProtocol>(?<auth_protocol>[^<]+)\" | eval user_raw=coalesce(UserId, Target_User_Name, Caller_User_Name, Client_User_Name, xml_user) | eval user=replace(user_raw, \"^the organization-AD\\\\\\\\\", \"\") | stats values(EventCode) as stages values(relying_party_raw) as rps_raw values(auth_protocol) as protos min(_time) as start_time values(user) as users by activity_id | eval token_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1200\")>=0,1,0) | eval cred_ok=if(mvfind(stages,\"1202\")>=0,1,0) | eval token_fail=if(mvfind(stages,\"1201\")>=0,1,0) | eval cred_fail=if(mvfind(stages,\"1203\")>=0,1,0) | eval outcome=case(token_ok==1 AND cred_ok==1,\"Success\",token_fail==1,\"Token Failure\",cred_fail==1,\"Credential Failure\",1=1,\"Other\") | where outcome!=\"Other\" | eval user=mvindex(users,0) | eval rps_raw=mvdedup(rps_raw) | eval rp_clean=mvfilter(rps_raw!=\"WS-Trust endpoint (legacy clients)\" AND rps_raw!=\"https://host.example.gov/[redacted-path] AND rps_raw!=\"urn:microsoft:userinfo\") | eval relying_party=coalesce(mvindex(rp_clean,0),mvindex(rps_raw,0)) | where relying_party!=\"urn:microsoft:userinfo\" | lookup ADFS_friendly_names.csv url as relying_party output friendlyName as rp_friendly | eval relying_party=coalesce(rp_friendly,relying_party) | eval proto_raw=lower(mvindex(mvfilter(len(protos)>0),0)) | eval protocol=case(match(proto_raw,\"oauth\"),\"OIDC\",match(proto_raw,\"saml\"),\"SAML\",match(proto_raw,\"wsfed\"),\"WS-Fed\",1=1,\"Other\") | eval idp=\"ADFS\" | eval sort_time=start_time | eval time=strftime(start_time,\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\") | table sort_time, time, user, relying_party, protocol, idp, outcome | append [search index=okta sourcetype=OktaIM2:log eventType=user.authentication.sso | spath output=user path=\"actor.alternateId\" | spath output=relying_party path=\"target{0}.displayName\" | spath output=outcome_result path=\"outcome.result\" | where relying_party!=\"SAML 2.0 IdP\" | eval user=if(user=\"system@okta.com\",\"Okta System\",user) | spath output=sign_on_mode path=\"debugContext.debugData.signOnMode\" | eval idp=\"Okta\" | eval protocol=case(sign_on_mode=\"SAML 2.0\",\"SAML\",sign_on_mode=\"OpenID Connect\",\"OIDC\",isnotnull(sign_on_mode),sign_on_mode,1=1,\"Other\") | eval outcome=if(outcome_result=\"SUCCESS\",\"Success\",\"Failure\") | eval sort_time=_time | eval time=strftime(_time,\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\") | table sort_time, time, user, relying_party, protocol, idp, outcome] | sort -sort_time | head 50 | table time, user, relying_party, protocol, idp, outcome | rename time AS Time, user AS User, relying_party AS \"Relying Party\", protocol AS Protocol, idp AS IDP, outcome AS Result",
        "queryParameters": {
          "earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
          "latest": "$global_time.latest$"
        }
      },
      "type": "ds.search"
    }
  },
  "layout": {
    "globalInputs": [
      "input_global_trp"
    ],
    "layoutDefinitions": {
      "layout_1": {
        "options": {
          "display": "auto",
          "height": 1350,
          "width": 2100
        },
        "structure": [
          {
            "item": "viz_header",
            "type": "block",
            "position": {
              "x": 0,
              "y": 0,
              "w": 2100,
              "h": 50
            }
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_adfs_count",
            "position": {
              "h": 160,
              "w": 680,
              "x": 0,
              "y": 60
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_okta_count",
            "position": {
              "h": 160,
              "w": 680,
              "x": 690,
              "y": 60
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_migration_pct",
            "position": {
              "h": 160,
              "w": 720,
              "x": 1380,
              "y": 60
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_burndown",
            "position": {
              "h": 380,
              "w": 2100,
              "x": 0,
              "y": 230
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_adfs_rps",
            "position": {
              "h": 360,
              "w": 710,
              "x": 0,
              "y": 620
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_adfs_protocol",
            "position": {
              "h": 360,
              "w": 700,
              "x": 1400,
              "y": 620
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_okta_apps",
            "position": {
              "h": 360,
              "w": 670,
              "x": 720,
              "y": 620
            },
            "type": "block"
          },
          {
            "item": "viz_recent_adfs",
            "position": {
              "h": 360,
              "w": 2100,
              "x": 0,
              "y": 990
            },
            "type": "block"
          }
        ],
        "type": "absolute"
      }
    },
    "tabs": {
      "items": [
        {
          "label": "Migration Tracker",
          "layoutId": "layout_1"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[
{
	"hideEdit": false,
	"hideOpenInSearch": false,
	"hideExport": false
}
    ]]></meta>
</dashboard>
content.label: ADFS → Okta: Migration Tracker
